demo_sequence_results.name: Search demo parcel
demo_sequence_results.evidence: Command palette returned CFS-PARCEL-0149726579 with owner/account context.

demo_sequence_results.name: Select parcel
demo_sequence_results.evidence: Selected parcel state updated with CFS-PARCEL-0149726579 and MALL AT CONCORD MILLS LP.

demo_sequence_results.name: Active Selection updates
demo_sequence_results.evidence: Active Selection overlay showed parcel ID, owner/account, selected parcel loaded, zoning C-2, quality Review, and source API.

demo_sequence_results.name: Map focuses / parcel cage appears
demo_sequence_results.evidence: Map focus/selected parcel workflow was exercised after parcel detail hydration with geometry.

demo_sequence_results.name: Due Diligence domains and caveats appear
Report structure appears
demo_sequence_results.evidence: Executive Print showed selected parcel report, key findings, and High-Priority Review Flags.

demo_sequence_results.name: Model safety and current-best governance appear
demo_sequence_results.evidence: Methodology showed internal-only model status, CFS model foundation, and aggregate safety flags.

screenshot_capture.note: Screenshots were captured from the live local app through the in-app browser. Some section-specific screenshots may show the current viewport position rather than full-page capture.
